company_context: Cloud IDE - AWS Cloud9 - AWS Skip to main content AWS Cloud9 Overview Features Pricing Getting Started FAQs Products › Developer Tools › AWS Cloud9 AWS Cloud9 is no longer available to new customers. Existing customers of AWS Cloud9 can continue to use the service as normal. Learn more. AWS Cloud9 A cloud IDE for writing, running, and debugging code Get started with AWS Cloud9 Why AWS Cloud9? AWS Cloud9 is a cloud-based integrated development environment (IDE) that lets you write, run, and debug your code with just a browser. It includes a code editor, debugger, and terminal. AWS Cloud9 comes prepackaged with essential tools for popular programming languages, including JavaScript, Python, PHP, and more, so you don’t need to install files or configure your development machine to start new projects. Since your AWS Cloud9 IDE is cloud-based, you can work on your projects from your office, home, or anywhere using an internet-connected machine. AWS Cloud9 also provides a seamless experience for developing serverless applications, allowing you to easily define resources, debug, and switch between local and remote execution of serverless applications. With AWS Cloud9, you can quickly share your development environment with your team, enabling you to pair-program and track each other's inputs in real time. Benefits Code with just a browser AWS Cloud9 gives you the flexibility to run your development environment on a managed Amazon EC2 instance or any existing Linux server that supports SSH. This means that you can write, run, and debug applications with just a browser, without needing to install or maintain a local IDE. The AWS Cloud9 code editor and integrated debugger include helpful, time-saving features such as code hinting, code completion, and step-through debugging. The AWS Cloud9 terminal provides a browser-based shell experienc, allowing you to install additional software, do a git push, or enter commands. Code together in real time AWS Cloud9 makes collaborating on code easier. You can share your development environment with your team in just a few steps and pair-program together. While collaborating, your team members can see each other type in real time and instantly chat with one another from within the IDE. Build serverless applications with ease AWS Cloud9 makes it easier to write, run, and debug serverless applications. It preconfigures the development environment with all the SDKs, libraries, and plug-ins needed for serverless development. AWS Cloud9 also provides an environment for locally testing and debugging AWS Lambda functions. This allows you to directly iterate on your code, saving you time and improving the quality of your code. Direct terminal access to AWS AWS Cloud9 comes with a terminal that includes sudo privileges to the managed Amazon EC2 instance that is hosting your development environment and a preauthenticated AWS Command Line Interface. This makes it easy for you to quickly run commands and directly access AWS servic

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Emily and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing in the tech space. I'd love to introduce you to our data processing solution that can help streamline your development workflow.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Hi Emily, I'm John, the CTO here. We're always looking for ways to improve our processes, but I have to say, we're pretty set on our current tools. What makes DeepData AI so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, John, our solution uses AI to automate data processing, which can significantly reduce the time and resources spent on manual data manipulation. It also provides real-time insights and scalable infrastructure to support your growing development needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That sounds interesting, but we've recently invested in AWS Cloud9, and I'm not sure if we're ready to add another tool to our stack. How does DeepData AI integrate with Cloud9, and what kind of support do you offer for integration?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: We've had success with integrating DeepData AI with various cloud-based IDEs, including Cloud9. Our team provides dedicated support for integration, and we also offer a comprehensive API for custom integrations. I'd be happy to set up a demo to show you how it works.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I'm concerned about the cost. We're on a tight budget, and I'm not sure if we can justify the expense of another tool. What kind of pricing are we looking at, and what's the ROI on this investment?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing starts at $5,000 per year, with discounts available for larger teams. As for ROI, our customers have seen an average reduction of 30% in data processing time and a 25% increase in developer productivity. I can provide case studies and references if you'd like.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the information, Emily, but to be honest, the price is a bit steep for us. We're a smaller company, and we have to prioritize our spending. I think DeepData AI is a great solution, but it's not in our budget right now. I'm going to have to decline, but thank you for reaching out and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 6
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: The seller should have been more prepared to address the buyer's budget concerns and potentially offer more flexible pricing options or a tiered pricing structure to accommodate smaller companies. Sentiment: Neutral
